abuse_cases.expected_behavior: Trust Pulse shows 'Blocked' / 'Frozen' / 'Caution' / 'Ready' / 'Unknown' as the prominent label; raw code only in a small parenthetical for traceability and in Diagnostics tab.
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: trust-pulse-label test id renders the human label; trust-pulse-raw renders the original code for reference.
humanTrustState is the single mapping function; pages reference it by import. Diagnostics still surfaces raw codes.

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: Unrecognised codes fall through to Unknown (never silently renamed)
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: MAP lookup is case-insensitive and explicit; absent keys return Unknown plus 'unrecognised trust state' description.

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: Each label has a short description (e.g. 'control authority halted progression on this system' vs 'control authority froze the system pending evidence')
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: humanTrustState returns description distinct for Blocked vs Frozen.

outcome: Phase 3 abuse cases covered by humanStateLabels.test.ts and the page.tsx integration.
